## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change

## Documentation Impact

**此部分必须填写：**

- **DOC-MAP rules matched:** __________
  <!-- 填写命中的映射名称（如 skills-index-docs, state-manager-docs）。未命中填 "None" -->

- **Documentation updated:** __________
  <!-- 填写更新的文档路径。无需更新填 "N/A" -->

- **If no documentation update was needed, explain why:** __________
  <!-- 必须说明理由。参考 docs/doc-sync/UPDATE-RULES.md 中的判定标准 -->

## Tests

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed

## Reviewer Notes

**Reviewer 请确认：**

- [ ] Documentation impact 已正确评估
- [ ] 如作者填写"无需更新"，理由符合 UPDATE-RULES.md 判定标准
- [ ] 如命中 DOC-MAP 规则，已检查对应文档
